name: Stuffed Radishes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup kalamata or other brine-cured black olives, pitted and minced
1 tablespoon drained bottled capers, chopped fine
2 tablespoons minced fresh parsley leaves plus small sprigs for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the narrow end of each radish half so that it will stand upright.
2. Using a melon-ball cutter, hollow out a 3/4-inch cavity in each half. Place the hollowed halves into a bowl of ice and cold water to prevent them from browning.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the cream cheese until smooth. Stir in the pitted black olives, chopped capers, minced parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
4. Transfer the mixture to a pastry bag fitted with a 1/2-inch plain tip.
5. Arrange the hollowed radish halves on paper towels and let them drain for about 5 minutes.
6. Pipe the cream cheese mixture into each hollowed half.
7. Garnish each stuffed radish with a parsley sprig.
8. The radishes can be prepared up to 1 1/2 hours in advance, covered, and chilled.
